name: Tom Perez
subject: Tomorrow's deadline is important, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
What we are able to raise by tomorrow's deadline will determine how much we can invest in campaigns and state parties in every corner of the country.
---
I know your time is limited -- so I'll be direct, Derek.

What we are able to raise by tomorrow's deadline will determine how much we can invest in campaigns and state parties in every corner of the country. So, I'm asking:

**Can I count on you to chip in a $3 donation before tomorrow's deadline?**

**[ DONATE: $3](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522992/4067b0a/5f2f3478e/7e4557a6/2078058199/VEsEAA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/april-deadline-2018?amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=25+-+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20180429_tp_v1s1&source=em_20180429_tp_v1s1&refcode=em_20180429_tp_v1s1")
[DONATE: $10](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522992/4067b0a/5f2f3478e/7e4557a7/2078058199/VEsEAw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/april-deadline-2018?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=26+-+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20180429_tp_v1s1&source=em_20180429_tp_v1s1&refcode=em_20180429_tp_v1s1")
[DONATE: $25](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522992/4067b0a/5f2f3478e/7e4557a4/2078058199/VEsEAg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/april-deadline-2018?amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=27+-+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20180429_tp_v1s1&source=em_20180429_tp_v1s1&refcode=em_20180429_tp_v1s1")
[DONATE: $50](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522992/4067b0a/5f2f3478e/7e4557a5/2078058199/VEsEDQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/april-deadline-2018?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=28+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20180429_tp_v1s1&source=em_20180429_tp_v1s1&refcode=em_20180429_tp_v1s1")
[DONATE: $100](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522992/4067b0a/5f2f3478e/7e4557a2/2078058199/VEsEDA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/april-deadline-2018?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=29+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20180429_tp_v1s1&source=em_20180429_tp_v1s1&refcode=em_20180429_tp_v1s1")
[Or donate another amount.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522992/4067b0a/5f2f3478e/7e4557a3/2078058199/VEsFBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/april-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=30+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20180429_tp_v1s1&source=em_20180429_tp_v1s1&refcode=em_20180429_tp_v1s1")
** Together, we are moving our party forward and defying all expectations -- but you and I both know our work is cut out for us this year. If we are going to build a permanent organizing infrastructure in all 50 states for this year's midterms and beyond, we have to invest in our state parties and campaigns right now.

**[I'm asking you, Derek: Chip in a $3 donation before tomorrow's end-of-month deadline. What we are able to do together in the next 40 hours will determine how much we can invest in Democrats.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522992/4067b0a/5f2f3478e/7e4557a0/2078058199/VEsFBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/april-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=31+-+Im+asking+youCUSTOMDATASETslugwhitelistc&utm_campaign=em_20180429_tp_v1s1&source=em_20180429_tp_v1s1&refcode=em_20180429_tp_v1s1")**

Thanks for being part of this,

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

P.S. -- By the way, we're going to hit our grassroots fundraising goal of 70,000 individual donations for April any minute now. We're officially going to raise our goal to 75,000 donations for the month -- **[before midnight tomorrow, can you make one of them, Derek?](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522992/4067b0a/5f2f3478e/7e4557a1/2078058199/VEsFBw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/april-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=32+-+before+midnight+tomorrow+can+you+make+if&utm_campaign=em_20180429_tp_v1s1&source=em_20180429_tp_v1s1&refcode=em_20180429_tp_v1s1")**

subject: You haven't donated yet this year. Can you contribute before tomorrow's deadline?

body:
Republicans and special interest groups will try to use legislation and dark money to drown out our voices this year -- so we have to be vigilant.
---
Right now Republicans are actively trying to strip away the right to vote away from millions of Americans. They know that when more people vote, they lose and Democrats win.

It's up to us to show Republicans that if they are going to come at our right to vote, we're going to come for their jobs.

If we don't show them that there's an electoral price to their heinous attacks on voting, they're never going to stop. There's one consequence Republicans understand in the era of Donald Trump: Losing.

**Tomorrow at midnight is a critical FEC fundraising deadline, and I am counting on your help to stand up to Republican attacks on our democracy. Contribute $3 for the first time in 2018 before Monday's deadline to fight voter suppression and elect Democrats in all 50 states.**

** Electing Democrats this year will help us get over this detour in our country's journey to liberty and justice. Your support will empower people to get to the polls and protect the right to vote for years to come.

The Democratic Party is already doing some great work -- like their IWillVote campaign and voter protection efforts in places like Arizona and Wisconsin. But Republicans and special interest groups are gearing up to enact legislation and throw dark money at us in an effort to drown out our voices this year -- so we have to be vigilant.

**[There couldn't be a more important time to step up. Contribute $3 before Monday's critical deadline to help protect voters' rights and elect Democrats up and down the ballot this year.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405229b2/4067b0a/5f02667ef/7e451965/2432569552/VEsFBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/april-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=31+-++if+consinConsGroup29422++else+There+cou&utm_campaign=em_20180429_jk_v1s1&source=em_20180429_jk_v1s1&refcode=em_20180429_jk_v1s1")**

Let's send a message to the vote suppressing politicians across the country today: If they want to attack our democracy, they're going to have to go through us.

Thanks,

Jason Kander

name: Team Kasich
subject: The Latest
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich
body:
Gov John Kasich was a guest on CNN's State of the Union, where he
weighed in on our country's continued polarization and how both
political parties are not appealing to the majority of Americans.

Peter - Gov John Kasich was a
guest on CNN's State of the Union, where he weighed in on our
country's continued polarization and how both political parties
are not appealing to the majority of Americans:
Country Over Party:

Saving the Republican Party:

Action on Common Sense Gun
Reforms:

With the leadership of Gov. John
Kasich, state legislators from both parties and community
leaders, Ohio is working to implement the kinds of common sense
gun reforms that that make sense and will save lives, while also
protecting peoples' Second Amendment rights.

Last week, Gov. Kasich signed an
Executive Order to strengthen compliance with the National
Criminal Background Check System to keep guns out of the wrong
hands. Watch his remarks here:

Is it really almost May
already!?!?

We're nearing our April
fundraising deadline and could use your help. Our message is
making a difference but we need to raise the funds to continue
paying for the services that allow us to support Gov. Kasich's
mission.

If you'd like to chip in $10,
$25, $50 or whatever you can to help, please visit our secure
donation form (here).

Leading By Example:

Under Gov. Kasichs leadership and
with the hard work of state legislators, Ohio continues to set an
example for other states and the nation by having balanced
budgets and a jobs climate that supports small businesses and
those who come to the Buckeye State to create jobs and strengthen
our communities.

Just this last week, Gov. Kasich
announced that the state will issue a Worker's Compensation
rebate that will return $1.5 billion dollars to Ohio businesses,
schools and local governments.

It's just one more example about
how Ohio is using every tool in the box to make our environment
for job creation on of the best in the nation!

Sen. John McCain:

Gov. Kasich recently met with a
group of students at Episcopal High School in Alexandria, VA to
hear their thoughts and opinions about some of the issues that
face young Americans.

This also happens to be the alma
mater of Sen. John McCain! Gov. Kasich and the students had a
special message for the Senator:

Thank you for all that you're
doing to help!
-Team Kasich

Paid for by Kasich
for America
www.JohnKasich.com

subject: Why a Republican would vote for me.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
#
Friend,
As we are fast approaching the primary, in a state where Democrats outnumber Republicans two-to-one, folks think we should spend millions of dollars on television, trying to convince Republicans to vote for us.
But if a Republican votes for me, they'll vote to end corruption. They'll vote for me to make sure their small business gets a better deal on healthcare. They'll vote for me to ensure that young people can go to college and not come out drowning in debt.
We're not going to spend millions on ad buys to try and convince people Democrats are something that we're not. We're going to be 100% authentic, we're not going to be anything but ourselves. We're going to continue to stand up for our values, and every working person in this state. **[If you stand with me, chip in $5 to our end-of-month fundraising goal my campaign today!](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a7e7/7ab0e2c4/7fa27bec/349a5356/4235521331/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiT0hRMDQyOThDIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bj-st4-18?refcode=OHQ04298C")**
If we want to continue to be the party of civil rights, women's rights, union rights, labor rights, and workers rights without apology, **we can win big.**
Onward,
Ben

clean_body: Friend, As we are fast approaching the primary, in a state where Democrats outnumber Republicans two-to-one, folks think we should spend millions of dollars on television, trying to convince Republicans to vote for us. But if a Republican votes for me, they'll vote to end corruption. They'll vote for me to make sure their small business gets a better deal on healthcare. They'll vote for me to ensure that young people can go to college and not come out drowning in debt. We're not going to spend millions on ad buys to try and convince people Democrats are something that we're not. We're going to be 100% authentic, we're not going to be anything but ourselves. We're going to continue to stand up for our values, and every working person in this state. "" If we want to continue to be the party of civil rights, women's rights, union rights, labor rights, and workers rights without apology, we can win big. name: Jay Inslee
subject: Net Neutrality [Deadline]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
What progressive leadership is accomplishing. | [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79bfd/2f5ea88d/71cec3ad/2cbca1a8/672688447/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/inslee-eom?utm_source=ema_2018-04-29_eom-3-nn&refcode=ema_2018-04-29_eom-3-nn&utm_campaign=eom-3-nn&utm_medium=ema") Friend, **D.C. politicians tried to kill net neutrality this week.** In Washington state, we stopped them in their tracks. One of my proudest moments last month was signing the first bill in the nation protecting net neutrality. Our state was the first in the nation to pass legislation protecting net neutrality -- and it was done with strong bipartisan support in the House and the Senate. We've built a model for the rest of the country and today we're still leading, forging a coalition of states taking the Trump administration to court to undo their disastrous and dangerous move. It's what the times demand: strong progressive leadership that takes action. But I can't do it alone. [**Help me show Donald Trump and Congress what can be achieved when progressive leaders work to find common ground. We must bring in $20,000 by midnight Monday.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79bfd/2f5ea88d/71cec3ad/2cbca1a8/672688447/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/inslee-eom?utm_source=ema_2018-04-29_eom-3-nn&refcode=ema_2018-04-29_eom-3-nn&utm_campaign=eom-3-nn&utm_medium=ema") We took action in Washington because we saw a problem: attacks on a free and open internet. While Congress refused to step up, we forged a legislative coalition to prevent federal government agencies like the FCC from obstructing innovation in our 21st-century economy. Protecting net neutrality is the bold progressive action these times demand. With so many attacks on our freedoms, it's time for progressive leaders to step up. [**As we head to November, will you help me show what progressive leadership looks like and what it can achieve?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79bfd/2f5ea88d/71cec3ad/2cbca1a8/672688447/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/inslee-eom?utm_source=ema_2018-04-29_eom-3-nn&refcode=ema_2018-04-29_eom-3-nn&utm_campaign=eom-3-nn&utm_medium=ema") Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [CONTRIBUTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79bfd/2f5ea88d/71cec3ad/2cbca1a8/672688447/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/inslee-eom?utm_source=ema_2018-04-29_eom-3-nn&refcode=ema_2018-04-29_eom-3-nn&utm_campaign=eom-3-nn&utm_medium=ema")

"" | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Since taking office, I've been fighting to improve the lives of Pennsylvania families by creating good-paying jobs, protecting seniors, investing in education, and ensuring access to affordable healthcare. "" They're fighting to roll back all the progress we've made. But I'm fighting with everything I've got, every single day, against Republicans and their reckless agenda. But we've got to spread the word and take on the false, Republican attacks. And that means we need a strong field program. "" "" Thank you, Tom Paid for by Tom Wolf for Governor Contributions or gifts to Tom Wolf for Governor are not tax deductible.

name: Rahsheim Wright
subject: People Over Profits
body:
|
---
[ ](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff19/767134fb/5c8cfe56/43383b39/2798620791/VEsH/ "http://www.donnaforprincegeorges.org/")

| | Hi Friend, I wanted to make sure you saw Donna's note below. At the beginning of her campaign, Donna made a promise to she would not accept donations from corporate developers and has kept that promise. **[Donna is running a grassroots campaign for Prince George's County Executive, and we are counting on your support. Will you make a contribution of $5 or more today?](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff19/767134fb/5c8cfe56/43383b36/2798620791/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/4000fordonna#")** Every dollar you contribute will bring us closer to Donna's vision of a county that puts people first the profits of corporate developers. Our county can achieve even more great things when we work together. Rahsheim Wright Donna for Prince George's County Campaign Manager **\---Forwarded Message---** Hello Friend, I made a promise to you that I would not accept a dime in campaign contributions from real estate developers and I have kept my word. It was important to me that my campaign for County Executive was fueled by grassroots support because it is the people of Prince George's I want to serve, not corporate interests. **And with less than 2 months until Election Day, I am still the only candidate in the County Executive 's race who has made and kept this promise to voters.** [**We are 60 days from the June 26 primary and I need at least 4,000 members of the community to make a contribution of $5 or more. Can you help by making a contribution today? **](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff19/767134fb/5c8cfe56/43383b37/2798620791/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/4000fordonna") One of my opponents has accepted over $400,000 from the same old real estate developers -- and their lawyers, lobbyists, contractors, and property management companies -- that have called the shots in Prince George's County for far too long. I believe that working with you, the community is the path to victory -- because our county deserves leaders who will put their needs first. From the very beginning of this campaign, I have been clear: I cannot and will not be bought. I still believe that our community will only thrive with leadership that puts people over profits. My vision for Prince George's County is one where we build safe and sustainable neighborhoods that serve the interests of the people who live and work in them. [**If you support this vision, then I hope you will stand with me as one of 4,000 community members who contribute $5 or more to my campaign today. **](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff19/767134fb/5c8cfe56/43383b37/2798620791/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/4000fordonna") Thank you again for your continued support. Together, we can build a better Prince George's County. Donna
---
